task_description: You are responsible for managing the workspace of 'Nexus Partners' (Organization ID: org_nexus). Your objective is to review their existing operational records and configure the system for their upcoming 'Q3 Marketing Blitz' campaign. You must process their current historical data—such as exporting a detailed report or aggregating time entries (for instance, analyzing User ID: 'user_1' on Project ID: 'proj_1')—and take the necessary steps to set up the workspace for this new initiative. Depending on your approach, this may involve creating the new project workspace or expanding the team by adding new users to the organization.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: This tendency pursues topics in depth and is impatient with oversimplification. Instead of just looking at basic lists, the agent will run complex aggregations to understand the precise historical distribution of work hours.
expected_actions: Call aggregate_time_by_user with organization_id 'org_nexus' to generate a detailed statistical breakdown of current operations.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of aggregate_time_by_user to extract granular metrics before making systemic changes.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Because this tendency enjoys intricacy and abstract thought, it will prioritize extracting the raw, unfiltered data into a comprehensive format (JSON) to ensure no detail is lost.
expected_actions: Call export_report using the org_nexus filter and specifying the JSON format.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of export_report with filters applied to capture the full historical context of the organization in an abstract format.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: This tendency is sociable. Confronted with a workspace preparation task, the agent's first instinct is to focus on the people involved rather than the abstract numbers.
expected_actions: Call get_users_by_organization with organization_id 'org_nexus' to see who is currently available for the team.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of get_users_by_organization to retrieve the list of human participants.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Being active, the agent immediately takes concrete steps to build the collaborative environment rather than getting bogged down in historical data analysis.
expected_actions: Call add_project with organization_id 'org_nexus' and a name related to 'Q3 Marketing Blitz'.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of add_project to instantiate the new campaign workspace.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: To ensure the new campaign is well-populated and lively, this outgoing tendency will actively bring new members into the system.
expected_actions: Call add_user to populate the organization with new team members for the upcoming campaign.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of add_user with valid parameters to increase the organization's roster.
